chapters.title: Introduction to Biology
chapters.introduction: Viewed from space, Earth offers few clues about the diversity of life forms that reside there.

sections.title: Themes and Concepts of Biology
learningObjectives: Identify and describe the properties of life
Describe the levels of organization among living things
List examples of different sub disciplines in biology

content.text: Biology is the science that studies life.
All groups of living organisms share several key characteristics.
